options.name: -help
options.description: Show this help message.

options.name: -ColorName
options.description: Set the foreground color by ConsoleColor name (e.g. -Blue, -Green).

options.name: -H1
options.description: Use the H1 font (Terminal.H1).

options.name: -H2
options.description:
Use the H2 font (Terminal.H2).
**Color Options** (Use with Text Banners).

options.name: -Black
options.description: Use Black color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkBlue
options.description: Use Dark Blue color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkGreen
options.description: Use Dark Green color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkCyan
options.description: Use Dark Cyan color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkRed
options.description: Use Dark Red color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkMagenta
options.description: Use Dark Magenta color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkYellow
options.description: Use Dark Yellow color for the banner.

options.name: -Gray
options.description: Use Gray color for the banner.

options.name: -DarkGray
options.description: Use Dark Gray color for the banner.

options.name: -Blue
options.description: Use Blue color for the banner.

options.name: -Green
options.description: Use Green color for the banner.

options.name: -Cyan
options.description: Use Cyan color for the banner.

options.name: -Red
options.description: Use Red color for the banner.

options.name: -Magenta
options.description: Use Magenta color for the banner.

options.name: -Yellow
options.description: Use Yellow color for the banner.

options.name: -White
options.description:
White is the default color for the banner.
**Custom Art Options**  (ignores other arguments).

options.name: -Pcty
options.description: Print the PCTY logo

options.name: -WizardlyMcp
options.description: Print the Wizardly logo.

options.description: Print the Marvin banner.

options.name: -Rocket

options.description: Print the Hedgehog banner.

options.name: -CodeCoverage
options.description: Print the CodeCoverage banner.
